raw_text:
St Cloud Families,
It’s time to rally together for our St Cloud Jaguar Jog fundraiser! 
Our goal is to raise $60,000 for programming throughout the year,
which will enhance our school’s resources and provide our students
with an even better educational experience.
SIGN UP CHALLENGE: If 85% of St Cloud students sign up on
mybooster.com, the WHOLE school will have a PJ Day!
To make things even more exciting, if we raise $60,000,
then Mr Price will dress up as an ASTRONAUT!
We are encouraging you to...
Sign up at MyBooster.com and join the fun.
Share your fundraising page with friends and family.
Donate if you are able.
Thank you for your support!JAGUAR JOG JAGUAR JOG JAGUAR JOG
